headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -95.7)
key_insights: Fears trending up 47% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 121 quotes and 88 at strong intensity - people are venting aggressively today with nearly triple yesterday's score.

• This frustration level sits in the upper half of the 77-day range, showing significantly elevated anger compared to typical activity.

• Optimism dropped further into negative territory while fears remained similarly low as yesterday.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
